data.title: S&P Global introduces AI-driven insights with machine-readable metadata on S&P Global Marketplace to enhance data usability across various sectors.
data.description: Recent news highlights the significance of machine-readable metadata in enhancing comprehension and accessibility of cloud data. The vendor-neutral framework aids various tools, from traditional to AI-centric ones. The datasets are prepared for AI integration, covering economic, fundamental, cross-referencing, OTC derivatives, loan pricing, insurance, and more. The developments were shared on July 17th in New York, showcasing the value of such advancements.

data.title: Nabors Energy Transition Corp. II (NETD) extends business combination deadline by one month, from July 18, 2025.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, Nabors Energy Transition Corp. II (Nasdaq: NETD) disclosed an extension in the deadline for finalizing a business merger. The Company's board of directors opted to push the deadline back by one month, from the original date of July 18, 2025. This decision grants NETD additional time to complete the business combination.

data.title: US ITC confirms favorable trade decision on low-speed personal transport vehicles from China impacting golf cart, LSPTV markets.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, in Washington, the U.S. International Trade Commission delivered a positive final decision in favor of American manufacturers of various vehicles including golf carts, personal transportation vehicles, low-speed vehicles, and light utility vehicles, collectively known as LSPTVs. This decision marks a significant win for the U.S. LSPTV industry.

data.title: Trump set to sign the US' first major crypto bill after House approval, including stablecoin GENIUS Act; another market structure bill passed.
data.description: The GENIUS Act, which is focused on stablecoin regulation, successfully passed through the House of Representatives with significant bipartisan backing. Additionally, a bill pertaining to market structure also gained approval and is set to progress to the Senate for further review.

data.title: Semler Scientific invests $25M in Bitcoin, yet stock falls 22% YTD. Analysts suggest Bitcoin isn't a cure-all for the company.
data.description: An analyst has reported that the company's stock price has experienced a downward trend throughout 2025. This suggests that relying solely on a Bitcoin strategy may not be a cure-all for the company.

data.title: ETH price jumps to $3,432 on ETF inflows and institutional adoption, with a 20% weekly surge. Analysts foresee $3,500 as zkEVM is integrated.
data.description: The price of Ethereum surged to $3,432, experiencing a 20% weekly increase driven by inflows from ETFs and growing institutional adoption. Analysts expect the momentum to continue, with predictions indicating the price could reach $3,500 next, especially with the integration of zkEVM technology.

data.title: Three bills in Congress aim to regulate cryptocurrency industry. One bill close to becoming law.
data.description: This week, the House considered three bills aimed at creating a national system for overseeing the cryptocurrency sector. Among them, one bill is on the verge of passing Congress to be enacted as law.
